'''fosadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibric|fibric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibric|fibric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fosadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosadithi|fosadithi]] || [[word:fosadiji|fosadiji]] || [[word:fosadishi|fosadishi]] || [[word:fosadiki|fosadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosaduthuthu|fosaduthuthu]] || [[word:fosadujuju|fosadujuju]] || [[word:fosadushushu|fosadushushu]] || [[word:fosadukuku|fosadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosaduthu|fosaduthu]] || [[word:fosaduju|fosaduju]] || [[word:fosadushu|fosadushu]] || [[word:fosaduku|fosaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosadufthuf|fosadufthuf]] || [[word:fosadufjuf|fosadufjuf]] || [[word:fosadufshuf|fosadufshuf]] || [[word:fosadufkuf|fosadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosadethe|fosadethe]] || [[word:fosadeje|fosadeje]] || [[word:fosadeshe|fosadeshe]] || [[word:fosadeke|fosadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosadothotho|fosadothotho]] || [[word:fosadojojo|fosadojojo]] || [[word:fosadoshosho|fosadoshosho]] || [[word:fosadokoko|fosadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosadotho|fosadotho]] || [[word:fosadojo|fosadojo]] || [[word:fosadosho|fosadosho]] || [[word:fosadoko|fosadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosadofthof|fosadofthof]] || [[word:fosadofjof|fosadofjof]] || [[word:fosadofshof|fosadofshof]] || [[word:fosadofkof|fosadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfthÃŸf|fosadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfjÃŸf|fosadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfshÃŸf|fosadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfkÃŸf|fosadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fosadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fosadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fosadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fosadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfthÃŸf|fosadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfjÃŸf|fosadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfshÃŸf|fosadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfkÃŸf|fosadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfthÃŸf|fosadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfjÃŸf|fosadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfshÃŸf|fosadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosadÃŸfkÃŸf|fosadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosadÃḊthÃḊ|fosadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fosadÃḊjÃḊ|fosadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fosadÃḊshÃḊ|fosadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fosadÃḊkÃḊ|fosadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosadathatha|fosadathatha]] || [[word:fosadajaja|fosadajaja]] || [[word:fosadashasha|fosadashasha]] || [[word:fosadakaka|fosadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosadatha|fosadatha]] || [[word:fosadaja|fosadaja]] || [[word:fosadasha|fosadasha]] || [[word:fosadaka|fosadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosadafthaf|fosadafthaf]] || [[word:fosadafjaf|fosadafjaf]] || [[word:fosadafshaf|fosadafshaf]] || [[word:fosadafkaf|fosadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fosadasha|fosadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosadshÃḋsha|fosadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosadrosha|fosadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosadmusha|fosadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosadyasha|fosadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosadnkshÃḋsha|gofosadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosadnkrosha|gofosadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosadnkmusha|gofosadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosadnkyasha|gofosadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fosasadasha|fosasadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosasadshÃḋsha|fosasadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosasadrosha|fosasadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosasadmusha|fosasadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosasadyasha|fosasadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosasadnkshÃḋsha|gofosasadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosasadnkrosha|gofosasadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosasadnkmusha|gofosasadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosasadnkyasha|gofosasadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fesÃḊdasha|fesÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fesÃḊdshÃḋsha|fesÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fesÃḊdrosha|fesÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fesÃḊdmusha|fesÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fesÃḊdyasha|fesÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofesÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gofesÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofesÃḊdnkrosha|gofesÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofesÃḊdnkmusha|gofesÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofesÃḊdnkyasha|gofesÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fosfadasha|fosfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosfadshÃḋsha|fosfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosfadrosha|fosfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosfadmusha|fosfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosfadyasha|fosfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosfadnkshÃḋsha|gofosfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosfadnkrosha|gofosfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosfadnkmusha|gofosfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosfadnkyasha|gofosfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
